---
name: "\U0001F6E0️ Developer Experience"
about: Report issues or suggest improvements related to setup, tooling, onboarding,
  or contributor workflow
title: "[DX] "
labels: developer-experience
assignees: seldonrios

---

## 🛠️ Summary
Describe the developer experience issue or improvement idea.

Examples:
- confusing setup
- missing prerequisites
- hard-to-run dev environment
- unclear repository structure
- slow contributor workflow
- poor local tooling
- inconsistent scripts

---

## 🎯 Problem
What is frustrating, unclear, slow, or blocking for contributors?

---

## 👤 Who Is Affected?
Who experiences this issue?

- [ ] First-time contributors
- [ ] Returning contributors
- [ ] Maintainers
- [ ] Everyone

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce / Experience
If applicable, explain how someone encounters this issue:

1. Clone repo
2. Follow setup docs
3. Run command / script
4. Encounter issue / confusion

---

## 🧠 Environment
Please provide relevant details:

- OS:
- Shell / terminal:
- Runtime versions:
- Package manager(s):
- Container / local setup:
- Branch / commit:

---

## 📍 Affected Area
Check all that apply:

- [ ] Repo structure
- [ ] Installation / setup
- [ ] Local development
- [ ] Build tooling
- [ ] Testing workflow
- [ ] Linting / formatting
- [ ] Scripts / automation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / contributor checks
- [ ] IDE / editor workflow
- [ ] Other: _______

---

## ✅ Suggested Improvement
What would make the developer experience better?

Examples:
- clearer docs
- one-command setup
- better error messages
- starter scripts
- improved repository conventions
- better examples
- contributor checklists

---

## 🧪 Workarounds
Did you find a workaround? If so, describe it here.

---

## 📈 Impact
How important is this?

- [ ] 🔴 High — blocks contribution
- [ ] 🟠 Medium — slows contribution
- [ ] 🟡 Low — minor friction

---

## 🔗 Related Files / Docs / Issues
List anything relevant:
- setup docs
- scripts
- workflows
- PR checks
- prior issues or discussions

---

## 🤝 Contribution Interest
Would you like to help improve this area?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe
- [ ] No
